description: Extract and sign-extend immediate from instruction
functionality: Examines the instruction opcode and extracts the immediate field according to the RISC-V specification. For I-type, sign-extends bit 31; for S-type, concatenates upper bits with lower bits; B-type includes zero as LSB; U-type places immediate in upper 20 bits; J-type uses a special encoding. Outputs the fully sign-extended 32-bit immediate value.
